prompt: I'm starting a fresh Godot 4.x project and want to use godot-mcp to build it. I have sprite sheets downloaded already. Walk me through setting everything up from scratch, including MCP configuration.

assertions.text: Covers GODOT_PATH env var in .mcp.json config
Includes headless import step for assets
Instructs to commit .uid and .import files to git
Clearly lists what MCP can vs cannot do
